channel.title: Welcome to LibreKeys documentation on LibreKeys documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to LibreKeys documentation on LibreKeys documentation

item.title: Fido only communication mode
item.description: This explains how to resolve the issue of a key that is not detected by PCSC driver under GNU/Linux operating system. When this happens, using the picoforge application shows a status of Online - Fido and it is not possible change some configuration items

item.title: Getting Started
item.description: This page tells you how to get started with LibreKeys
